title: Honey Butter Skillet Corn
ingredients: 1 16oz bag of white & golden corn, thawed and drained
instructions:
In a medium skillet, over medium heat, melt the butter and add the honey.
Once the butter is melted and is well combined with the honey, add the corn. Cook until the corn is heated through.
Add the cream cheese, salt and pepper and cook until heated and creamy.
Serve immediately.
